zh: 教材的设计基于学生的心理特征、认知水平和兴趣。
en: The textbook is designed based on students psychological characteristics, cognitive levels, and interests.

zh: 重要的是材料能够帮助学生发展语言技能并用英语表达他们的想法。
en: Its important for the materials to help students develop language skills and express their ideas in English.

zh: 这些材料旨在将学生的学习与他们的日常生活和兴趣联系起来，以避免枯燥。
en: The materials focus on connecting students learning with their daily lives and interests to avoid boredom.

zh: 此外，教材强调发展语言学习策略和技能。
en: Furthermore, the textbooks emphasize the development of language learning strategies and skills.

zh: 包含互动任务和活动，以鼓励学生积极参与英语课堂。
en: Interactive tasks and activities are included to encourage students to actively participate in the English classroom.

zh: 与老师和同学的持续合作和交流是提高英语水平的关键。
en: Constant collaboration and communication with teachers and classmates are key to improving your English level.

zh: 为了在学习英语中取得成功，你需要充分利用各种资源和机会。
en: To succeed in learning English, you need to utilize a variety of resources and opportunities.

zh: 听、说、读、写、记忆和使用英语都是有效的学习方法。
en: Listening, speaking, reading, writing, memorizing, and using English are all effective ways to learn.

zh: 学生应继续与额外的英语学习资源互动，以扩展他们的知识。
en: Students should continue to engage with additional English learning resources to expand their knowledge.

zh: 这些材料整合了文化教学内容，包括中国文化、英语文化和非英语国家文化。
en: The materials incorporate cultural teaching content, including Chinese culture, English culture, and cultures of nonEnglish speaking countries.

zh: 持续的努力和奉献将带来你在英语学习方面的更大进步。
en: Continued effort and dedication will lead to greater progress in your English studies.

zh: 吴明是表兄弟、陌生人还是朋友？
en: Wu Ming and Harry are cousins, strangers, or friends?

zh: 吴明去新加坡、香港或澳门度假。
en: Wu Ming went to Singapore, Hong Kong, or Macao for his vacation.

zh: 吴明拜访了他的亲戚、朋友或同学。
en: Wu Ming visited his relatives, friends, or classmates.

zh: 吴明最喜欢外出就餐、购物或端午节。
en: Wu Ming liked eating out, shopping, or the Dragon Boat Festival best.

zh: 克拉拉将在两个星期后前往清迈。
en: Clara is going to Chiang Mai in two weeks.

zh: 本认为那里四月份是一年中最热的月份。
en: Ben believes that April is the hottest month of the year there.

zh: 克拉拉认为新年是打扫卫生和清除坏运气的时间。
en: Clara thinks that the new year is a time for cleaning and washing away bad things.

zh: 人们仰望月亮，与家人分享月饼。
en: People admire the moon and share mooncakes with their families.

zh: 中国人民几个世纪以来一直在庆祝中秋节并品尝月饼。
en: Chinese people have been celebrating the MidAutumn Festival and enjoying mooncakes for centuries.

zh: 后羿因为太悲伤而每天晚上都对着月亮呼喊她的名字。
en: Hou Yi was so sad that he called out her name to the moon every night.

zh: 去三楼。
en: Go to the third fl oor.

zh: 去二楼。
en: Go to the second fl oor.

zh: 超市在花店和书店之间。
en: The supermarket is between the fl ower store and the bookstore.

zh: 过去书店。
en: Go past the bookstore.

zh: 我太兴奋了，想试试游乐设施！
en: Im excited to try the rides!

zh: 有太空世界，水世界，动物世界......
en: Th eres Space World, Water World, Animal World...

zh: 你想休息一下吗？但我们才刚开始呢！
en: You want to rest? But we havent even started yet!

zh: 你是指洗手间还是浴室？
en: You mean a washroom or bathroom?

zh: 这太有趣了！
en: Th at was fun!

zh: 你永远不知道除非你尝试一下。
en: You never know until you try something.

zh: 你想现在去水世界吗？
en: Do you want to go to Water World now?

zh: 它提供美味的食物。
en: It serves delicious food.

zh: 招牌上写着每晚都有乐队在此演出。
en: Th e sign says a rock band plays here every evening.

zh: 你能告诉我们乐队几点开始演出吗？
en: Could you tell us when the band starts playing this evening?

zh: 那个餐厅那段时间总是很忙，所以来得早一点才能订位。
en: Th e restaurant is always busy at that time, so come a little earlier to get a table.

zh: 你能告诉我哪里可以买药吗？
en: Could you please tell me where I can buy some medicine?

zh: 你能告诉我怎么去邮局吗？
en: Could you please tell me how to get to the post offi ce?

zh: 露易莎以前上课很安静。
en: Paula used to be really quiet in class.

zh: 她总是很沉默，而且不太积极地玩耍。
en: She was always silent and didnt play very actively.

zh: 现在她对每天几乎都玩耍更感兴趣了。
en: Now shes more interested in playing almost every day.

zh: 比利以前非常害羞和安静，而且脸会红。
en: Billy used to be so shy and quiet, and his face would turn red.

zh: 凯迪以前是个非常害羞的女孩，她开始唱歌。
en: Candy used to be a really shy girl who took up singing.

zh: 她鼓起勇气在课堂上唱歌，后来在整个学校里唱歌。
en: She dared to sing in front of her class and then for the whole school.

zh: 亚历弗德觉得很有趣看到人们的变化。
en: Alfred thinks its interesting to see how people have changed.

zh: 吉娜同意比利发生了很大的变化。
en: Gina agrees that Billy has changed so much.

zh: 艾米丽以前很少吃蔬菜，但现在她喜欢胡萝卜和西红柿。
en: Emily didnt use to eat a lot of vegetables, but now she loves carrots and tomatoes.

zh: 你以前比较矮，是吗？是的，我以前是。
en: You used to be short, didnt you? Yes, I did.

zh: 凯迪建议年轻人做好准备放弃他们的正常生活。
en: Candy advises young people to be prepared to give up their normal lives.

zh: 格蕾丝以前看电视很多。
en: Grace used to watch a lot of TV.

zh: 科学博物馆提供了一个对科学发现的迷人一瞥。
en: The science museum offers a fascinating glimpse into scientific discoveries.

zh: 艺术与科学展览以一种独特的方式结合了创造力和学习。
en: The art and science fair combines creativity and learning in a unique way.

zh: 环境保护是一个我们必须解决的至关重要问题。
en: Environmental protection is a crucial issue that we must address.

zh: 一架模型飞机可以展示基本的飞行原理。
en: A model plane can demonstrate basic principles of flight.

zh: 一幅美丽的绘画能引发情感并激发创造力。
en: A beautiful painting evokes emotion and inspires creativity.

zh: 草和树叶在我们的生态系统中发挥着重要作用。
en: Grass and leaves play an important role in our ecosystem.

zh: 帕姆和刘俊讨论了中国茶的生产。
en: Pam and Liu Jun discussed the production of Chinese tea.

zh: 康健感到惊讶，发现许多产品来自中国。
en: Kang Jian was surprised to find many products made in China.

zh: 艰难的寻找美国产品凸显了一个全球趋势。
en: The difficult search for American products highlights a global trend.

zh: 人们在杭州种植茶，杭州以其茶叶生产而闻名。
en: People grow tea in Hangzhou, a region known for its tea production.

zh: 拉链于1893年被发明。
en: The zipper was invented in 1893.

zh: 由惠特康·朱迪逊发明的。
en: It was invented by Whitcomb Judson.

zh: 茶大约在5000年前首次饮用。
en: Tea was first drunk about 5,000 years ago.

zh: 申农是第一个发现茶作为饮料的人。
en: Shen Nong was the first to discover tea as a drink.

zh: 棕色的水产生了宜人的气味。
en: The brown water produced a nice smell.

zh: 茶在6世纪和7世纪传入朝鲜和日本。
en: Tea was brought to Korea and Japan during the 6th and 7th centuries.

zh: 茶叶贸易在19世纪进行。
en: The tea trade took place in the 19th century.

zh: 毫无疑问，中国人最了解茶的本质。
en: The Chinese are without doubt the ones who best understand the nature of tea.

zh: 世界上最受欢迎的饮料是意外地被发明的。
en: One of the worlds favorite drinks was invented by accident.

zh: 冰箱以低价出售。
en: The fridge was sold at a low price.

zh: 电话由亚历山大·格伦·贝尔发明的。
en: The telephone was invented by Alexander Graham Bell.

zh: 当我们到达时，门被打破了。
en: The door was broken when we arrived.

zh: 十六岁的孩子不应该被允许夜间工作。
en: Sixteenyearolds should not be allowed to work at night.

zh: 他应该修剪一下头发。
en: He should cut his hair.

zh: 他需要和朋友们相处。
en: He needs to spend time with friends.

zh: 年轻人需要睡觉。
en: Young people need to sleep.

zh: 这看起来不太干净。
en: It doesnt look clean.

zh: 青少年应该被允许选择自己的衣服。
en: Teenagers should be allowed to choose their own clothes.

zh: 当我还是个哭哭啼啼的小婴儿时，我的妈妈为我唱歌，并一直陪伴在我身边。
en: When I was a tiny baby crying all night, my mom sang to me and stayed by my side.

zh: 当我疲倦又饥饿时，她给了我食物和温暖的怀抱让我入睡。
en: When I was tired and hungry, she gave me food and warm arms to sleep in.

zh: 当我七岁时，咳嗽得厉害时，她说我不许吃冰淇淋。
en: When I was seven coughing badly, she said no icecream for me.

zh: 我后悔大声反驳，没有听妈妈的话。
en: I regret talking back, not listening to Mom.

zh: 你认为青少年应该被鼓励做自己的决定吗？
en: Do you think teenagers should be encouraged to make their own decisions?

zh: 不，我不认同这件事。青少年太小了，无法做出自己的决定。
en: No, I dont agree with this. Teenagers are too young to make their own decisions.

zh: 如果你不使用闪光灯，那可能没问题。
en: If you dont use a fl ash, then it may be OK.

zh: 你的房间每天必须打扫干净。
en: Your bedroom must be cleaned every day.

zh: 家务会在下午完成。
en: The housework will be done in the afternoon.

zh: 孩子们应该被鼓励为社区做社会服务。
en: Children should be encouraged to do social work for their community.

zh: 你认为青少年？
en: Do you think teenagers ?

zh: 青少年应该被给予机会做出自己的决定。
en: Teenagers should be given chances to make their own decisions.

zh: 青少年在开始工作时应该要求搬出去吗？
en: Should teenagers ask to move out when they start working?

zh: 有一个书包在公园里。
en: Th eres a schoolbag at the park.

zh: 那个人可能要去我们的学校。
en: The person probably goes to our school.

zh: 那个人也许是个男孩。
en: The person might be a boy.

zh: 那可能是我妹妹的发夹。
en: It could be Meis hair band.

zh: 那个发夹属于琳达。
en: The hair band belongs to Linda.

zh: 这肯定不是琳达的书包。
en: It cant be Lindas schoolbag.

zh: 看看！公园里有一个书包。
en: Look! Theres a schoolbag here.

zh: 这不可能被偷了。
en: It cant be stolen.

zh: 有人一定把它捡起来了。
en: Somebody must have picked it up.

zh: 我们住在小镇上，几乎每个人都认识彼此。
en: We live in a small town and almost everyone knows each other.

zh: 镇上正在发生一些不寻常的事情。
en: Something unusual is happening in our town.

zh: 我们每晚都能听到窗外奇怪的声音。
en: Every night we hear strange noises outside our window.

zh: 那可能是一只动物，但我的朋友们认为那一定是青少年。
en: It could be an animal, but my friends think it must be teenagers.

zh: 他们认为那可能只是风。
en: Th ey think it might be the wind.

zh: 赫莲也很担心。
en: Helen is worried, too.

zh: 那可能是一只狗，但我没看到狗或其他任何东西。
en: It might be a dog, but I couldnt see a dog or anything else.

zh: 这不可能是一只狗。
en: It cant be a dog.

zh: 也许是熊或者狼。
en: Maybe it was a bear or a wolf.

zh: 我们镇上的人都有自己的想法。
en: Everyone in our town has his or her own ideas.

zh: 一定有人在我们街区家家户户拜访。
en: Th ere must be something visiting the homes in our neighborhood.

zh: 那个制造噪音的人玩得太开心了，在社区里制造恐惧。
en: Th e noisemaker is having too much fun creating fear in the neighborhood.

zh: 这是谁的排球？一定是卡拉的。
en: Whose volleyball is this? It must be Carlas.

zh: 这是谁的发夹？可能是我妹妹的或者琳达的。
en: Whose hair band is this? It could be Meis or Lindas.

zh: 我不确定，但这不可能是一只狗。
en: Im not sure, but it cant be a dog.

zh: 你那天看到了什么？我想那可能是一只熊或者狼。
en: What did you see that night? I think it might be a bear or a wolf.

zh: 卡门喜欢演奏不同类型音乐的音乐家。
en: Carmen likes musicians who play different kinds of music.

zh: 徐飞喜欢澳大利亚歌手丹·德维什。
en: Xu Fei likes the Australian singer Dan Dervish.

zh: 卡门喜欢那种很大的电子音乐。
en: Carmen likes electronic music thats loud.

zh: 徐飞更喜欢演奏安静缓慢歌曲的团体。
en: Xu Fei prefers groups that play quiet and slow songs.

zh: 卡门说：“我真的很喜欢丹·德维什。”
en: I really love Dan Dervish I like musicians Carmen says.

zh: The Modern 真的很棒，我喜欢电子音乐。
en: The Modern are really great I love electronic music.

zh: 卡门说：“我喜欢音乐家。”
en: I like musicians Xu Fei says.

zh: 我认为 The Modern 太吵了，我更喜欢团体。
en: I think The Modern are too noisy I prefer groups.

zh: 斯科特，你周末在做什么？
en: What are you doing this weekend, Scott?

zh: 这都是音乐，没有歌唱。
en: Its all music theres no singing.

zh: 没有歌唱。
en: Th eres no singing.

zh: 我喜欢我可以跟着唱的音乐。
en: I like music that I can sing along.

zh: 玛丽亚是一位交换学生，在晚餐时犯了一些错误。
en: Maria is an exchange student who made some mistakes at dinner.

zh: 重要的是玛丽亚在晚上7点准时到达，但她迟到了。
en: It was important for Maria to arrive at 700, but she was late.

zh: 在瑞士晚上7点收到邀请时，人们预计你在中午在那里。
en: When youre invited for 700 in Switzerland, youre expected to be there at noon.

zh: 约翰向佐藤鞠躬，因为这是日本人互相问候的方式。
en: John bowed to Sato because thats how people in Japan greet each other.

zh: 凯蒂在第一次见面时，与玛丽一样，举起手示意亲吻。
en: Katie did the same thing when she first met Marie, holding out her hand for a kiss.

zh: 据信法国人见面时会握手。
en: French people are supposed to shake hands when they meet each other.

zh: 在哥伦比亚，晚餐可以稍微迟到没关系。
en: In Colombia, its okay to be a little late for dinner.

zh: 特蕾莎·洛佩斯来自哥伦比亚，她重视和朋友们共度时光。
en: Teresa Lopez is from Colombia and she values spending time with her friends.

zh: 马克·拉布兰克来自瑞士，他认为不应该让别人等太久。
en: Marc LeBlanc is from Switzerland and he believes its impolite to keep others waiting.

zh: 在瑞士，准时非常重要。
en: Its very important to be on time in Switzerland.

zh: 初次见面时，人们预计你穿着西装和领带。
en: Youre expected to wear a suit and tie when meeting someone for the first time.

zh: 等待艾米导致蒂娜迟到了。
en: Waiting for Amy drove Tina late.

zh: 艾米不想在摇滚餐厅看电影。
en: Amy didnt want to watch the movie at Rockin Restaurant.

zh: 嘈杂的音乐让约翰想离开。
en: Loud music makes John want to leave.

zh: 那部电影太悲伤了，让蒂娜和艾米哭了。
en: The movie was so sad that it made Tina and Amy cry.

zh: 悲伤的电影不会让约翰哭，只会让他想放松。
en: Sad movies dont make John cry they just make him want to relax.

zh: แนน西认为她因为朱莉现在和她成为了更好的朋友而惹恼了艾丽丝。
en: Nancy thinks shes made Alice mad because Julie is now a better friend with her.

zh: 贝特建议每次和朱莉一起做某事时，就邀请艾丽丝加入。
en: Bert suggests asking Alice to join them each time they do something with Julie.

zh: 如果悲伤的电影能让我哭，我们的友谊会更强大。
en: Our friendship will be stronger if sad movies make me cry.

zh: 根据故事，金钱和名望并不总是能让人幸福。
en: Money and fame dont always make people happy, according to the story.

zh: 她说那部悲伤的电影让她哭了起来。
en: She said that the sad movie made her cry.

zh: 嘈杂的音乐让我感到紧张。
en: The loud music makes me nervous.

zh: 当我回到家时，我意识到我把钥匙留在背包里了。
en: When I got home, I realized I had left my keys in the backpack.

zh: 当我回到学校时，铃已经响过了。
en: By the time I got back to school, the bell had rung.

zh: 在上课之前，老师已经开始讲课了。
en: Before I got to class, the teacher had already started teaching.

zh: 我正要加入小组的时候，我听到了一声很大的噪音。
en: I was about to join the group when I heard a loud noise.

zh: 我正在等公交车的时候，公交车已经走了。
en: As I was waiting for the bus, the bus had already left.

zh: 马特问凯文他为什么迟到了。
en: Matt asked Kevin why he was late for class.

zh: 凯文解释说他的闹钟没响。
en: Kevin explained that his alarm clock hadnt gone off.

zh: 好幸好，卡尔的爸爸开车把他接到了学校。
en: Luckily, Carls dad gave Kevin a lift in his car.

zh: 当凯文到达学校时，他只迟到了五分钟。
en: By the time Kevin got to school, he was only five minutes late.

zh: 生活充满了意想不到的事件。
en: Life is full of unexpected events.

zh: 我在2001年，在世界贸易中心找到了一份工作。
en: I found a job in New York at the World Trade Center in 2001.

zh: 在喝咖啡之前，第一架飞机已经撞上了我的办公楼。
en: Before I got a coffee, the first plane had already hit my office building.

zh: 我感到幸亏活了下来，经历了9/11事件。
en: I felt lucky to be alive after the events of September 11th.

zh: 我早上10点醒来，意识到我的闹钟从未响起过。
en: I woke up at 1000 a.m. and realized my alarm had never gone off.

zh: 当我到达机场时，我的去新西兰的飞机已经起飞了。
en: By the time I got to the airport, my plane to New Zealand had already taken off.

zh: 我对自己说，这是我一年来的第一次假期。
en: I thought to myself that it was the first holiday Id taken in a year.

zh: 其他飞机都已满员，所以我不得不等到第二天。
en: The other planes were full, so I had to wait till the next day.

zh: 我听说了9月11日的新西兰地震的前一天。
en: I heard about the earthquake in New Zealand the day before.

zh: 我难以置信地盯着燃烧的大楼。
en: I stare in disbelief at the burning building.

zh: 空气严重污染，因为最近道路上的车辆太多了。
en: The air is badly polluted because there are too many cars on the road these days.

zh: 工厂燃烧煤炭也会用大量的黑色烟雾污染空气。
en: Factories that burn coal also pollute the air with a lot of black smoke.

zh: 人们把垃圾和废弃物扔到公园里，把美丽的场所变成了丑陋的地方。
en: People throw rubbish and waste into parks, turning beautiful places into ugly ones.

zh: 杰森担心这里空气污染的问题。
en: Jason is worried about the air becoming polluted around here.

zh: 苏珊以前可以看见天上的星星。
en: Susan used to be able to see stars in the sky before the pollution increased.

zh: 像自带购物袋这样的简单行为可以帮助减少污染。
en: Simple things like bringing a bag to go shopping can help reduce waste pollution.

zh: 人们应该把垃圾扔进垃圾桶，保持公共场所干净美丽。
en: People should throw rubbish in the bins and keep public places clean and beautiful.

zh: 为了减少空气污染，我们应该乘坐公共汽车或地铁而不是开车。
en: To cut down air pollution, we should take the bus or subway instead of driving.

zh: 重要的是要记住，鲨鱼是海洋食物链的顶端。
en: Its important to remember that sharks are at the top of the food chain in the ocean.

zh: 环保组织正在向公众宣传非法捕鲨行为，以阻止鲨鳍的交易。
en: Environmental protection groups are teaching the public about finning to stop the sale of shark fins.

zh: 很多人并不知道自己享用鲨鱼鳍汤时，实际上是在杀死一条鲨鱼。
en: Many people do not realize they are killing a whole shark when they enjoy a bowl of shark fin soup.

zh: 有人不喜欢体育课。
en: Someone didnt like P.E.

zh: 有人被老师建议休息一下跑步。
en: Someone was advised to take a break from running by a teacher.

zh: 有人身体不适。
en: Someone had a health problem.

zh: 有人加入了学校乐队。
en: Someone joined the school band.

zh: 有人喜欢Mr. Hunts的教学方法。
en: Someone liked Mr. Hunts teaching methods.

zh: 谁想学习医学？
en: Who wants to study medicine?

zh: Brian告诉某人休息一下跑步。
en: Brian told someone to take a break from running.

zh: 谁伤了膝盖？
en: Who hurt his or her knee?

zh: Mr. Hunt身体不适。
en: Mr. Hunt had a health problem.

zh: 谁认为“That’s Life”演唱会是最好的回忆？
en: Who thinks the Th ats Life concert is the best memory?

zh: Lisa认为“That’s Life”演唱会是最好的回忆。
en: Lisa thinks the Th ats Life concert is the best memory.

zh: 你还记得Mr. Hunt吗？
en: Do you remember Mr. Hunt?

zh: Ms. Lee总是对你进行数学课的耐心指导。
en: Ms. Lee was always patient with you in math class.

zh: Mr. Brown指导我科学方面取得了很大的进步。
en: Mr. Brown guided me to do a lot better in science.

zh: Ms. Griffin鼓励我在英语课上。
en: Ms. Griffin encouraged me in English class.

zh: 因为她，我付出了更多的努力，我的考试成绩翻了倍。
en: Because of her, I put in more effort and my exam scores doubled.

zh: 我们应该送给他们一张卡片和礼物表示感谢吗？
en: Shall we get each of them a card and gift to say thank you?

zh: 好主意。我们明天去购物吧！
en: Good idea. Lets go shopping tomorrow!

zh: 这是一种写作形式吗？
en: What kind of writing is this?

zh: 这是一篇关于回顾过去三年的人生文章。
en: It is a passage about looking back at past three years.

zh: 这篇写作的主要内容是什么？
en: What is the main subject of this writing?

zh: 主要内容是回忆中学时期的经历。
en: The main subject is remembering experiences from junior high school.

zh: 你认为作者是谁？
en: Who do you think the writer is?

zh: 作者在回忆中学时期的经历。
en: The writer is reflecting on their time in junior high school.

zh: 我记得许多事情，也制造了不少混乱。
en: I remember many things and making a great big mess.

zh: 我记得学校运动会的兴奋。
en: I remember the excitement of the school sports day.

zh: 那是来自外国的东西。
en: That is from a foreign land.

zh: 自豪在于战胜恐惧，我们努力去理解。
en: Pride of overcoming fear we work hard to understand.

zh: 我记得开学第一天，现在是毕业了。
en: I remember starting day one and now its time to graduate.

zh: 为了永远铭记，我会想念学校里的树木和花朵。
en: To remember forever Ill miss the school trees and flowers.

zh: 互相帮助做作业，还有我们善良和关爱我们的老师。
en: Helping each other with homework and our kind and caring teachers.

zh: 我们美好的回忆。
en: Wonderful memories of ours.

zh: 当我升入高中时，我会加入学校游泳队。
en: When I get to senior high, I will join the school swim team.

zh: 我中学时期的生活非常愉快。
en: My time in junior high school has been enjoyable.

zh: 在八年级，我更加努力学习，但英语成绩仍然很差。
en: In Grade 8, I studied harder but I still got poor grades in English.

zh: 明年，我就升入高中了！时间过得真快！
en: Next year, I will be in senior high school. I cant believe how fast the time went by!
